name: Curried Lentils Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the vegetables and apple into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a large skillet, sauté the garlic and scallions in lemon juice, tamari, and water until fragrant.
3. Add the curry powder and cook for about 30 seconds to blend the flavors.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (fresh tomatoes, tomato paste, sliced mushrooms, apple, additional black pepper, red lentils, and cooked brown rice).
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer and heat through thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly coated with the sauce.
Serve the curried lentils and rice over a healthy portion of your choice.
